description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout and large floor-to-ceiling windows along the front and side facades. The exterior combines white and dark gray walls with wooden accents, and the front yard is landscaped with palm trees, shrubs, and a driveway leading to a carport. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all visible through the open roof design. The front entrance is marked by a glass door and a small porch area, while the rear and side yards are enclosed by wooden fencing. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front yard featuring palm trees and a carport. The exterior blends white, gray, and wood accents, with an open, airy layout and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, landscaped yard with palm trees, and wooden fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the open-plan interior layout with visible room divisions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional windows, and the overall room arrangement from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, more of the garden, and the side facade with grouped windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
